name: prixmaviz
description: AI-native diagram tool — renders 29+ engines (Mermaid, PlantUML, D2, Vega-Lite, TikZ, Graphviz, WaveDrom, Bytefield, Microsoft Visio .vsdx, etc.) with annotations, multi-tile infinite canvas, and shared-workspace AI loop. Round-trips Visio files: drop a .vsdx in to render natively, or build a diagram and export as Visio-editable .vsdx.

interface.shortDescription: AI-native diagram tool — Mermaid, PlantUML, D2, Vega-Lite, TikZ, Graphviz, Visio (.vsdx), 29+ engines
interface.longDescription: PrixmaViz lets your AI coding agent render diagrams in a real browser canvas. Ask for a sequence diagram, an ER schema, a Vega-Lite chart, a TikZ physics scene — it renders via the appropriate engine (Mermaid, PlantUML, D2, Vega-Lite, TikZ, Graphviz, WaveDrom, Bytefield, BPMN, Excalidraw, and 18 others), persists into an annotatable infinite-canvas workspace, and feeds your region/pin/tag annotations back to the AI so the next iteration knows what you pointed at. **Microsoft Visio round-trip**: drop a .vsdx in to render natively, or build a flowchart and export as a Visio-editable .vsdx. Hosted free at prixmaviz.ailuxis.com; self-host via docker-compose.
defaultPrompt: Draw me the OAuth 2.1 PKCE flow as a sequence diagram
Render a Vega-Lite chart of the Fibonacci sequence to N=20
Show the causal structure of Minkowski spacetime with light cones
